PumpedUpKick — macOS 安装说明 / Installation Notes
====================================================

[中文]

1. 拷贝插件到以下位置:

   PumpedUpKick.component  ->  ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/Components/
   PumpedUpKick.vst3       ->  ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/

2. 【必须】解除 macOS 隔离属性。

   本插件是免费开源软件,没有购买 Apple 开发者账号($99/年),因此
   没有经过 Apple 公证。从网上下载的文件会被 macOS 打上隔离标记,
   Logic / FL Studio 会拒绝加载。请在"终端"中执行:

   xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/Components/PumpedUpKick.component
   xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/PumpedUpKick.vst3

   注意:插件不能用"右键 -> 打开"的方式绕过,那个方法只对 App 有效。

3. 重启宿主软件。Logic 启动时会重新扫描插件。
   如果仍未出现,在终端执行 auval -a 强制刷新 AU 缓存。

如果你不想执行上述命令,也可以直接从源码自行编译 —— 本地编译的产物
不带隔离属性,装上即可使用。详见项目 README。


[English]

1. Copy the plugins to:

   PumpedUpKick.component  ->  ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/Components/
   PumpedUpKick.vst3       ->  ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/

2. [REQUIRED] Remove the macOS quarantine flag.

   This is free open-source software built without a paid Apple Developer
   ID, so it is not notarized. macOS quarantines downloaded files and your
   DAW will refuse to load them. Run this in Terminal:

   xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/Components/PumpedUpKick.component
   xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/PumpedUpKick.vst3

   Note: the "right-click -> Open" trick does NOT work for plugins; it only
   applies to .app bundles.

3. Restart your DAW. Logic rescans plugins on launch; run "auval -a" to
   force an AudioUnit cache refresh if it still does not show up.

Alternatively, build from source — locally built binaries carry no
quarantine flag and work immediately. See the project README.
